extraction.one_line_summary: KITTEL Marcel won Stage 2 sprint in Germany after Quick Step's leadout plan failed, jumping wheel-to-wheel through gaps in final 500m
tactical_patterns: Quick Step riders racing on expiring contracts showed extra motivation, Kittel delivering under team-wide pressure to prove renewal worth.
Crash at 30km from corner entry, team doing chase work (Katusha) pushed too hard unnecessarily, exposing positioned-correctly Froome.
Kittel's willingness to abandon leadout plan and improvise wheel-jumping through gaps demonstratessprinter maturity rarely seen early-Tour.
Finney's 200km breakaway for KOM jersey swap reveals tactical willingness to suffer for secondary classification this early.

rider_signals.KITTEL Marcel: positive: Showed rare tactical patience and improvisation ability when planned Quick Step leadout failed in final 500m
rider_signals.FROOME Chris: neutral: Positioned correctly 8 riders back behind working teams but caught in crash, no tactical error evident
rider_signals.FINNEY Taylor: positive: Aggressive early Tour tactics, leading 99% of stage for KOM points suggests non-traditional GC support role
rider_signals.CAVENDISH Mark: positive: Reached fifth place after crashing at 50km/h shows exceptional recovery ability under duress
rider_signals.KUENG Stefan: positive: White jersey suggests BMC prioritizing his results over pure domestique role for Porte early-Tour
